notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Kameron Misner.

notableEvents.label: Jose Altuve GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Altuve grounds into a double play, pitcher Noah Cameron to second baseman Michael Massey to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Isaac Paredes out at 2nd. Jose Altuve out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes reaches on a fielding error by center fielder Kameron Misner.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Christian Vázquez. Bobby Witt Jr. scores. Vinnie Pasquantino to 2nd.
